message.content:
In the project at /Users/gabiorma/gormaran-ai-growth-hub, read these files completely and return their full content:
1. src/pages/PricingPage.js
2. src/pages/CategoryPage.js
3. src/components/AIToolInterface.js (focus on the canUseTool check, error messages, and handleGenerate function)
4. src/context/AuthContext.js (focus on createUserProfile and what fields are stored in Firestore, and whether createdAt is stored)
5. src/context/SubscriptionContext.js (current state after recent edits)
6. src/i18n/en.json - lines 170 to 260 (pricing section)

Return the FULL content of each file.

content.text: I'll read all these files for you. Let me start by retrieving them in parallel.

Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing.
